description: Demand for clothing, accessories, and style-driven merchandise across the mall.
Demand for athletic gear, memorabilia, and collectibles tied to teams and seasons.
Demand for media, games, movies, and novelty items that keep shoppers amused.
Demand for food-court meals, snacks, and impulse treats near store entrances.
Demand for electronics, gadgets, and cutting-edge consumer technology.
Demand for retro games and sports memorabilia on the vintage shelf. Shared by Retro Games and Sports Cards — a shift in either store propagates to the other.
